sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_ffeab0a793967e1073ecfd5da503d698
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_alectri_zc_0.ZCCSimulatorUtil</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>ZCCSimulatorUtil</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var ZCCSimulatorUtil = Class.create();
ZCCSimulatorUtil.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
        this.tables = {
            'ALECTRI_SIMULATED_CONNECTOR': 'x_snc_alectri_zc_0_alectri_simulated_connectors',
            'ALECTRI_DATABASE': 'x_snc_alectri_zc_0_source_databases',
            'ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE': 'x_snc_alectri_zc_0_source_tables',
            'ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE_COLUMNS': 'x_snc_alectri_zc_0_source_table_columns',
            'ALECTRI_DF_TABLE': 'x_snc_alectri_zc_0_data_fabric_tables'
        };
    },
	referenceQualFilter:function(datasource){
		return 'alectri_simulated_connector=' + datasource;
	},

    checkIfAlectriDFtable: function(table_id) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('x_snc_alectri_zc_0_data_fabric_tables');
        gr.addEncodedQuery('table_id=' + table_id);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    },
    dropDFSimulatedTable: function(table_id) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('x_snc_alectri_zc_0_data_fabric_tables');
        gr.addEncodedQuery('table_id=' + table_id);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            gr.deleteRecord();
        }
    },
    checkIfAlectriConnection: function(connectionId) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SIMULATED_CONNECTOR);
        gr.addEncodedQuery('connection_id=' + connectionId);
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next()) {
            return true;
        } else {
            return false;
        }
    },


    simulateTestConnectionObject: function(connectionId) {
        var obj = {
            "additionalDetails": {
                "connectionId": connectionId
            },
            "status": true,
            "message": "Connection details successfully verified for Alectri Connection."
        };
        return obj;
    },

    simulateEstablishConnectionObject: function() {
        return {
            "status": true,
            "message": "Remote database refresh successful."
        };
    },

    simulateDatabaseSchema: function(connectionId) {

        var obj = {};
        var connectorGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SIMULATED_CONNECTOR);
        connectorGR.addEncodedQuery('connection_id=' + connectionId);
        connectorGR.query();
        if (connectorGR.next()) {


            var databaseGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_DATABASE);
            databaseGR.addEncodedQuery('alectri_simulated_connector=' + connectorGR.sys_id + '');
            databaseGR.query();
            while (databaseGR.next()) {


                if (obj[databaseGR.database_name + ''] == undefined) {
                    obj[databaseGR.database_name + ''] = [];
                }
                var sourceTableGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE);
                sourceTableGR.addEncodedQuery('source_database=' + databaseGR.sys_id + '');
                sourceTableGR.query();
                while (sourceTableGR.next()) {


                    obj[databaseGR.database_name + ''].push({
                        "id": sourceTableGR.table_id + '',
                        "name": sourceTableGR.table_id + '',
                        "servicenowTables": this.fetchDFtables(sourceTableGR.sys_id)
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        return obj;
    },

    fetchDFtables: function(sourceTableSysId) {
        var dfTableGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_DF_TABLE);
        dfTableGR.addEncodedQuery('source_table=' + sourceTableSysId);
        dfTableGR.query();
        var tablesArr = [];
        while (dfTableGR.next()) {
            tablesArr.push({
                "id": dfTableGR.table_id + '',
                "name": dfTableGR.table_id + '',
                "label": dfTableGR.table_label + '',
                "createdBy": {
                    "sysId": "matt.collins",
                    "name": "Matt Collins"
                }
            });
        }
        return tablesArr;
    },

    fetchTableColumns: function(tableId) {
        var tableGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE);
        tableGR.addEncodedQuery('table_id=' + tableId);
        tableGR.query();
        while (tableGR.next()) {
            var columnGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE_COLUMNS);
            columnGR.addEncodedQuery('source_table=' + tableGR.sys_id);
            columnGR.query();
            var colArr = [];
            while (columnGR.next()) {
                colArr.push({
                    "isRemoteColumnPrimaryKey": false,
                    "remoteColumnType": "string",
                    "remoteColumnTypeLabel": "VARCHAR",
                    "remoteColumnDigits": 0,
                    "remoteColumnLength": 255,
                    "remoteColumnLabel": columnGR.column_label + "",
                    "remoteColumnName": columnGR.column_name + "",
                    "isRemoteColumnNullable": true,
                    "isRemoteColumnMappable": true
                });
            }
            return colArr;
        }
    },
    fetchTableEditColumns: function(tableId) {
        var tableGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE);
        tableGR.addEncodedQuery('table_id=' + tableId);
        tableGR.query();
        while (tableGR.next()) {
            var columnGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE_COLUMNS);
            columnGR.addEncodedQuery('source_table=' + tableGR.sys_id);
            columnGR.query();
            var colArr = [];
            while (columnGR.next()) {
                colArr.push({
                    "glideColumnLabel": columnGR.column_label + "",
                    "glideColumnName": columnGR.column_name + "",
                    "glideColumnType": "string",
                    "isSelected": true,
					"isColumnPrimaryKey": false,
                    "isRemoteColumnPrimaryKey": false,
                    "remoteColumnType": "string",
                    "remoteColumnTypeLabel": "VARCHAR",
                    "remoteColumnDigits": 0,
                    "remoteColumnLength": 255,
                    "remoteColumnLabel": columnGR.column_label + "",
                    "remoteColumnName": columnGR.column_name + "",
                    "isRemoteColumnNullable": true,
                    "isRemoteColumnMappable": true
                });
            }
            return colArr;
        }
    },

	simulateConnectionDetails:function(tableId,connectionId){
		var tableGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE);
        tableGR.addEncodedQuery('table_id=' + tableId);
        tableGR.query();
		while(tableGR.next()){
		return {
        "createdOn": tableGR.sys_created_on+"",
        "errorMessage": "",
        "id": connectionId+'',
        "logo": "sn_data_fabric_zcc.redshift-logo.svg",
        "name": "AlectriDataBricks",
        "numMappedTables": 6,
        "scope": "global",
        "shortDescription": "",
        "source": "RedShift",
        "state": "CONNECTED"
    };
		}
	},

    createDataFabricTable: function(tableId, tableLabel) {
        var table_sys_id = '';

        var tableGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE);
        tableGR.addEncodedQuery('table_id=' + tableId);
        tableGR.query();
        if (tableGR.next()) {

            table_sys_id = tableGR.sys_id + '';
        }


        var gr = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_DF_TABLE);
        gr.initialize();
        gr.table_id = tableId + '';
        gr.table_label = tableLabel + '';
        gr.source_table = table_sys_id + '';
        gr.insert();
    },

    fetchAllDFtables: function(id) {
        var dfTableGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_DF_TABLE);
        if (id != undefined) {
            dfTableGR.addEncodedQuery('source_table.source_database.alectri_simulated_connector.connection_id=' + id)
        }
        dfTableGR.query();
        var arr = [];

        while (dfTableGR.next()) {


            arr.push({
                "updatedByDisplayName": "System Administrator",
                "createdByName": "admin",
                "glideTableName": dfTableGR.table_id + '',
                "updatedByName": "admin",
                "scopeName": "Global",
                "glideTableSysId": dfTableGR.sys_id + '',
                "updatedOn": dfTableGR.sys_updated_on + '',
                "schemaName": dfTableGR.source_table.source_database.database_name + '',
                "glideTableLabel": dfTableGR.table_label + '',
                "createdOn": dfTableGR.sys_created_on + '',
                "createdByDisplayName": "System Administrator",
                "connectionSysId": dfTableGR.source_table.source_database.alectri_simulated_connector.connection_id + '',
                "connectorSysId": dfTableGR.source_table.source_database.alectri_simulated_connector.sys_id + '',
                "connectionStatus": "CONNECTED",
                "remoteTableName": dfTableGR.source_table.table_name + '',
                "connectionName": dfTableGR.source_table.source_database.alectri_simulated_connector.connection_name + '',
                "connectionLabel": dfTableGR.source_table.source_database.alectri_simulated_connector.connection_name + '',
                "isConnectionActive": true
            });
        }
        return JSON.stringify(arr);
    },

    prepareHeaders: function(row) {
        var arr = [];
        for (key in row) {
            arr.push(key);
        }
        return arr;
    },

    readAttachmentContent: function(attachmentId) {
        var gsa = new GlideSysAttachment();
        //var fileContent = gsa.getContentStream('9925f2fc2fb4b690d3a6364fafa4e373');
        var fileContent = gsa.getContentStream(attachmentId);
        var myobjArray = [];
        var attachmentSID = attachmentId; // pass your excel attachment sys_id
        var parser = new sn_impex.GlideExcelParser();
        var attachment = new GlideSysAttachment();
        // use attachment sys id of an excel file
        var attachmentStream = attachment.getContentStream(attachmentSID);
        parser.parse(attachmentStream);
        if (parser.next()) {
            var row = parser.getRow();
            var headerArr = this.prepareHeaders(row);
        }
        return headerArr;
    },


    createSourceTable: function(tablename, tablelabel, databaseId, headerArr) {
        var sourceTableGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE);
        sourceTableGR.initialize();
        sourceTableGR.table_name = tablelabel;
        sourceTableGR.table_id = tablename;
        sourceTableGR.source_database = databaseId;
        var srcTableId = sourceTableGR.insert();
        //create source table columns
        for (var k = 0; k < headerArr.length; k++) {
            var colGR = new GlideRecord(this.tables.ALECTRI_SOURCE_TABLE_COLUMNS);
            colGR.initialize();
            colGR.column_label = headerArr[k];
            colGR.column_name = headerArr[k].toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_');
            colGR.source_table = srcTableId;
            colGR.insert();
        }

    },

    createTableFromExcel: function(attachmentId, tableName, tableLabel, databaseId) {
        var headerArr = this.readAttachmentContent(attachmentId);

        var globalZccUtil = new global.ZCCSimulatorUtil();
        globalZccUtil.createNewTable(tableName, tableLabel);
        globalZccUtil.createTableFields(tableName, headerArr);

		var dbGR = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
		dbGR.addEncodedQuery('nameLIKE'+tableName+'^sys_created_onRELATIVEGT@minute@ago@2');
		dbGR.orderByDesc('sys_created_on');
		dbGR.setLimit(1);
		dbGR.query();
		while(dbGR.next()){
			tableName = dbGR.name+'';
		}


        this.createSourceTable(tableName, tableLabel, databaseId, headerArr);

        globalZccUtil.insertRecords(attachmentId, tableName, headerArr);

    },

    generateTableLabel: function(tablename) {
        return 'u_' + tablename.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_');
    },

    tableExists: function(tableName) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
        gr.addEncodedQuery('name=' + tableName);
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next()) {
            return true;
        }
        gs.addErrorMessage('Table with same name already exists');
        return false;
    },

    type: 'ZCCSimulatorUtil'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-01-13 14:39:44</sys_created_on><sys_id>ffeab0a793967e1073ecfd5da503d698</sys_id><sys_mod_count>20</sys_mod_count><sys_name>ZCCSimulatorUtil</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Alectri ZCC Simulator" source="x_snc_alectri_zc_0">1556bceb93d27e1073ecfd5da503d6b6</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Alectri ZCC Simulator">1556bceb93d27e1073ecfd5da503d6b6</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_ffeab0a793967e1073ecfd5da503d698</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>gurjot.joshi@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-10 10:53:37</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
